sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sign_values (value Float64, description String);
SELECT value, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_sign_values WHERE sign(value) == 1;
SELECT value, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_sign_values WHERE sign(value) == 0 AND description != 'null value';
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_sign_values GROUP BY sign(value) HAVING sign(value) == -1;
SELECT SUM(value) AS sum_positive FROM test_sign_values WHERE sign(value) = 1;
SELECT description, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM (SELECT value, description FROM test_sign_values) AS subquery WHERE sign(value) = -1;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT value FROM test_sign_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sign(COALESCE(value, 0)) AS sign_value FROM temp_table WHERE sign(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sign(CAST(description AS Float64)) AS sign_value FROM test_sign_values WHERE description = '1.5' OR description = '-3.2';
